title: Data Table
description: Data Table component is a key UI element for displaying tabular data in a clear, organized format. It allows users to efficiently view, search, sort, and interact with large datasets. With customizable features like column sorting, filtering, pagination, and row selection, the Data Table provides a powerful solution for presenting and managing data in applications.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-data-table to display tabular data.

sections.title: Cell Template
sections.description: You can pass element ref to cellTemplate attribute for rendering your desired content.

sections.title: Empty Template
sections.description: You can pass a element ref to emptyTemplate property for rendering you custom empty state.

sections.title: Allow Resize And Reorder
sections.description: You can pass allowResizing boolean attribute to ax-text-columns for enable or disable columns resize and also pass allowReordering boolean attribute to ax-data-table for enable or disable columns reorder.

types.title: AXBaseDataTable
types.description: Abstract base class for data table components providing common functionality for data management, row selection, and hierarchical data handling.

props.name: dataSource
props.description: The data source for the table.

props.name: parentField
props.description: Field name for handling nested rows.

props.name: selectedRows
props.description: Array of selected rows.

events.name: selectedRowsChange
events.description: Emitted when the selected rows change.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the data source key field name.
 *
 * @returns string - The key field name for the data source.
 */
getDataSourceKey(): string

/**
 * Expands a row to show its children.
 *
 * @param row - The row data to expand.
 * @returns Promise<void> - Promise that resolves when expansion is complete.
 */
expandRow(row: any): Promise<void>

/**
 * Refreshes the children of a specific item.
 *
 * @param id - The ID of the item whose children should be refreshed.
 * @returns Promise<void> - Promise that resolves when refresh is complete.
 */
refreshItemChildren(id: string): Promise<void>

/**
 * Selects one or more rows.
 *
 * @param rows - The rows to select.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
selectRows(...rows: unknown[]): void

/**
 * Unselects one or more rows.
 *
 * @param rows - The rows to unselect.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
unSelectRows(...rows: unknown[]): void

props.name: dataSource
props.description: The data source for the table. Inherited from AXBaseDataTable.

props.name: rowTemplate
props.description: Custom template for table rows.

props.name: emptyTemplate
props.description: Template to display when the table is empty.

props.name: noDataTemplate
props.description: Template to display when no data is loaded yet.

props.name: alternative
props.description: Enable alternative row styling.

props.description: Show the table header.

props.name: fixedHeader
props.description: Enable sticky header.

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Show the table footer.

props.name: fixedFooter
props.description: Enable sticky footer.

props.name: itemHeight
props.description: Height of each row.

props.name: allowReordering
props.description: Enable column reordering.

props.name: paging
props.description: Enable paging.

props.name: fetchDataMode
props.description: Data fetching mode.

props.name: loading

type.name: { enabled: boolean; animation: boolean; loadingTemplate?: TemplateRef<unknown> }

props.description: Loading state configuration.

props.name: focusedRow
props.description: The currently focused row.

props.name: selectedRows
props.description: Array of selected rows. Inherited from AXBaseDataTable.

props.name: parentField
props.description: Field name for handling nested rows. Inherited from AXBaseDataTable.

events.name: focusedRowChange
events.description: Emitted when the focused row changes.

events.name: onRowClick
events.description: Emitted when a row is clicked.

events.name: onRowDbClick
events.description: Emitted when a row is double-clicked.

events.name: onColumnsOrderChanged
events.description: Emitted when the order of columns changes.

events.name: onColumnSizeChanged
events.description: Emitted when the size of columns changes.

events.name: selectedRowsChange
events.description: Emitted when the selected rows change. Inherited from AXBaseDataTable.

methods.content:
/**
 * Refreshes the data table with optional reset options.
 *
 * @param options - Configuration options for refresh operation.
 * @param options.reset - Whether to reset pagination state.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
refresh(options: { reset?: boolean } = { reset: true }): void

/**
 * Gets the data source key field name.
 *
 * @returns string - The key field name for the data source.
 */
getDataSourceKey(): string

/**
 * Expands a row to show its children.
 *
 * @param row - The row data to expand.
 * @returns Promise<void> - Promise that resolves when expansion is complete.
 */
expandRow(row: any): Promise<void>

/**
 * Refreshes the children of a specific item.
 *
 * @param id - The ID of the item whose children should be refreshed.
 * @returns Promise<void> - Promise that resolves when refresh is complete.
 */
refreshItemChildren(id: string): Promise<void>

/**
 * Selects one or more rows.
 *
 * @param rows - The rows to select.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
selectRows(...rows: unknown[]): void

/**
 * Unselects one or more rows.
 *
 * @param rows - The rows to unselect.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
unSelectRows(...rows: unknown[]): void

props.name: column
props.description: The column component to make resizable.

methods.content:
/**
 * Handles mouse down events to initiate column resizing.
 *
 * @param event - The mouse down event.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
onMouseDown(event: MouseEvent): void

/**
 * Handles mouse move events during column resizing.
 *
 * @param event - The mouse move event.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
onMouseMove(event: MouseEvent): void

/**
 * Handles raw mouse move events and forwards them to the debounced resize stream.
 * This method acts as a bridge between the raw DOM event and the debounced onMouseMove method.
 *
 * @param event - The raw mouse move event.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
onMouseMoveRaw(event: MouseEvent): void

/**
 * Handles mouse up events to complete column resizing.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
onMouseUp(): void

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the column. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: caption
props.description: Caption text for the column header. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: allowSorting
props.description: Whether the column can be sorted. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: allowResizing
props.description: Whether the column can be resized. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: fixed
props.description: Whether the column is fixed to start or end. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: dataField
props.description: Defines the data field to display in the column.

props.name: expandHandler
props.description: Controls the display of an expandable arrow icon beside the cell text.

props.name: wrapText
props.description: Toggles text wrapping in the cell.

props.name: cellTemplate
props.description: Provides a custom template for rendering cells within the column.

props.name: footerTemplate
props.description: Template used for rendering the footer of the column.

props.name: headerTemplate
props.description: Defines the template for rendering the column header.

props.name: format
props.description: Defines the format string for displaying values in the component.

props.name: formatOptions
props.description: Provides additional options for formatting values.

props.name: customExpandIcon
props.description: Custom icon class for expand state.

props.name: customCollapseIcon
props.description: Custom icon class for collapse state.

methods.content:
/**
 * Returns the template used for rendering cells.
 * Falls back to a default template if no custom template is provided.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The cell template.
 */
 renderCellTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Returns the template used for rendering the column footer.
 * Falls back to a default template if not provided.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The footer template.
 */
 renderFooterTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Retrieves the template used for rendering the column header.
 * Falls back to a default template if none is provided.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The header template.
 */
 renderHeaderTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Indicates whether loading functionality is enabled.
 *
 * @returns boolean - Always returns true for text columns.
 */
 loadingEnabled(): boolean

/**
 * Generates a unique name based on the dataField value.
 *
 * @returns string - The unique column name.
 */
 name(): string

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the column. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: caption
props.description: Caption text for the column header. Inherited from AXDataTableColumnComponent.

props.name: allowSorting
props.description: Whether the column can be sorted. Overridden to false for index columns.

props.name: allowResizing

props.description: Determines whether the index should be zero-padded.

props.name: footerTemplate
props.description: Template used for rendering the footer content of the column.

methods.content:
/**
 * Provides the cell template for custom rendering if defined.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The cell template.
 */
 renderCellTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Provides the header template for custom rendering if defined.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The header template.
 */
 renderHeaderTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Returns the template used for rendering the footer of the column.
 * This method returns the footerTemplate if it is provided; otherwise, it defaults to the _contentFooterTemplate.
 *
 * @returns TemplateRef<unknown> - The footer template.
 */
 renderFooterTemplate(): TemplateRef<unknown>

/**
 * Gets the unique identifier name for the column.
 *
 * @returns string - Returns 'cl-inx'.
 */
 name(): string

/**
 * Indicates whether loading is enabled for this component.
 *
 * @returns boolean - Always returns false for index columns.
 */
 loadingEnabled(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the CSS class applied to the component.
 *
 * @returns string - Returns 'ax-index-column'.
 */
 cssClass(): string
